note: Quet 07:2x BKK. PHAT HIEN LON: Shank It Golf CO dong POLO $33.00 (compare_at $55.00 = GIAM THAT -40%) - chua tung ghi nhan 4 ngay truoc vi feed limit=5 chi tra hat+grip. DINH CHINH #7: cau 'GP $54.95 re nhat nhom' la SAI - Shank It list $55.00 ~ ngang GP, sale $33 thi GP dat hon +66.5%. CAVEAT: Plain Jane = polo TRON, sub-segment khac voi GP novelty AOP -> khong doi dau truc tiep. Bay republish lan 3: Shank It polo published 17/07 nhung created 2025-03-04. KHONG co drop moi that toan nhom (ngay thu 2). Bogey Bros ▬ hoan toan. Bad Birdie xac minh lai collection ngay 2: Pique 84/Core 88/Ridge 94/Jacquard 94/FT 98. Mau thuan RESTOCKED badge vs feed available=false VAN Y NGUYEN, khong leo thang -> cua so 'doi thu can size' VAN MO ngay 4. BAT THUONG: 5/6 feed updated_at=17/07 ~00:20 UTC, rieng ShankIt=18/07 00:20 UTC; ca 6 store bump quanh 00:20 UTC moi ngay - GHI NHAN, KHONG chan doan. Trend search: bao nganh noi 'era of loud prints is fading' -> tin hieu NGUOC voi GP AOP, nhung bang chung ban (BadBirdie AOP can size) noi nguoc lai -> khong ket luan. || RUN 2 (09:30 BKK, task DA GOP): B1-B3 giu nguyen tu run 07:15 (du lieu feed 07:2x, con tuoi - KHONG quet lai de tranh lech so voi dong metrics nay). BO SUNG B4-B9 theo spec task gop. B4 vong xoay thu 6 = Uong & Golf: TIM DUOC BANG CHUNG CAU THAT dat LUAT 5 - BadBirdie x Four Peaks Brewing 'launch thanh cong nhat lich su Four Peaks' + hoodie chay hang + da co Collection 2.0; BadBirdie x Michelob Ultra capsule; FootJoy ra SKU Transfusion; Kenny Flowers espresso martini; Tattoo Golf co Cocktail Collection; Golf Digest co bai rieng ve 19th-hole apparel. DINH CHINH GIA DINH: BadBirdie KHONG scale bang so luong creative ma bang CO-BRAND (bia + giay PAYNTR $180) -> cau 'dung dua 12 creative/tuan' dung nhung 'BB dang dung yen' SAI. GP thieu dung 2 mieng trong ngach uong: SKU BIA va SKU Transfusion. | RE-RUN 8 KHOI: them B4-B8. B4 (u=6, Uong&golf/19th hole): PHAT HIEN nganh DONG chu KHONG phai khe trong - 7 brand duy tri collection cocktail, BadBirdie da vao => CAU CHU DE da chung minh, khe con lai la CACH THE HIEN (distance-reveal). B5 idea bank ngay DAU, chua ap duoc Luat 6 aging. B6: quarter-zip vuot hoodie; GP DA CO Half-Zip $69.95 = dung song va bang gia polo thuong BogeyBros (quan sat GIA, khong phai bang chung ban). B7: DNA khong doi nhung thanh loi the DUY NHAT sau khi mat chan gia. B8: Etsy/Amazon chan headless, chi link ben, khong y nao len xanh. LOI HA TANG: /tmp bi xoa giua cac lenh bash -> mat ban build lan 1, phai clone lai; health-check cu bao PASS gia khi git fail (chuoi rong = chuoi rong). || RE-CHECK 10:23 BKK (phien doc lap khac, task tu chay >=4 lan/ngay hom nay - CANH BAO van hanh): re-fetch 6/6 products.json, 0 DELTA so voi phien 09:37 - gia/ton kho/sold-out tat ca SKU giu nguyen. Phat hien: 2 phien chay gan nhu dong thoi ~10:23-10:24 BKK, moi phien viet B4-B8 khac nhau (cung ngach Uong&Golf do trung vong xoay nhung dan chung WebSearch khac) -> xung dot git. Da giu ban da len main truoc (a8bdc70), CHI bo sung B9 bi thieu hoan toan o ban do (ban kia tu ghi nhan loi ha tang /tmp bi xoa giua lenh). De nghi kiem tra lich chay - cron chinh thuc chi 1 lan/ngay 07:15 BKK nhung da chay >=4 lan.

Shank It collection - CAN QUET NGAY MAI de chot anchor polo that
Motion creative counts - nguon ben thu 3, cu 3 ngay
ideas_green: Sua cau so gia trong ad copy: bo 'GP re nhat nhom' -> 're nhat trong nhom polo IN HOA TIET'. SKU Polo $54.95. Bang chung: ShankIt list $55.00/sale $33.00 feed live 18/07.
Chot capsule 'Playoff Season' TUAN NAY - han chot that, con 1 tuan (hang phai ban dung 13/08). SKU Polo $54.95 + Hat $29.95. Bang chung: lich xac minh doc lap 2 lan.
SKU '19th Hole' distance-reveal, neo dong Polo/Hawaiian $54.95. Bang chung CAU CHU DE: 7 brand duy tri collection cocktail. CAVEAT: cau cho CACH THE HIEN = gia thuyet, chua co bang chung cau rieng.
ideas_yellow: SKU BIA (koozie/can AOP) - BadBirdie thang lon bang bia (Four Peaks 2.0 + Michelob) nhung GP khong co doi tac brewery; bia generic mat dung thu tao suc manh. Cho doi tac dia phuong.
1 SKU 'tonal/dialed-back' lam doi chung - bao nganh noi print to ha nhiet, bang chung ban noi nguoc (BadBirdie AOP can size). Test 1 SKU, dung xoay ca dong.
ideas_red: Ca nhan hoa / custom-face polo - thang dam tren Etsy nhung ops 1-1 per order, trai mo hinh sublimation AOP theo lo cua GP.
America 250th / patriotic - dip da qua 04/07/2026, khong mo capsule moi.
Youth/Junior polo - 2 brand doc lap cung ra youth $54-54.95 trong 10 ngay (Swannies 08/07, P&A 16/07) NHUNG mau thuan DNA: GP la brand NSFW (American Tatas, S-e-x Ed) -> khong ban do tre em.
evergreen: #1 NSFW distance-reveal sublimation & seamless all-over - NANG len 'tai san DUY NHAT' vi loi the GIA da mat 18/07 (ShankIt $33-55). Khe SAN PHAM da xac minh (6/6 feed khong brand nao co), CHUA phai khe CAU da xac minh.

#2 MOI 18/07: 'Uong x Golf / 19th Hole' - du tu cach evergreen: Golf Digest co bai rieng, BadBirdie x Four Peaks ra Collection 2.0 (lap lai = song), FootJoy + Kenny Flowers + Tattoo Golf cung khai thac, uong sau vong golf la TAP QUAN khong phai mua vu. Bo tro DNA: do uong = L0 chay paid, NSFW = L3 organic -> bu dung cho hong cua nhau.
#3 In-joke chi dan golf hieu - xa nghia 1, gan nghia 2; bang hinh (distance-reveal) hoac bang chu (pun thuat ngu golf kieu 'Daily Dose of Iron').

note: Quet 07:2x BKK = 19/07 ~20:2x ET. Prev data = 18/07 (GAP 19/07: khong co run ghi nhan). 6/6 feed doc duoc. 2 tin MOI tren ke: (1) Bogey Bros len dong cheeky 'Hard Corps/Get Wreck'd/Burnt Ends' glove $27.95 + polo $69.95, tag 'sfw-ish'+'everythings bigger' (naming innuendo) - doi thu buoc sang lanh dia cheeky cua GP nhung KHONG co distance-reveal; (2) Swannies 'Gopher Brewer Hat' $45 co-brand UMN Gophers + bia, theu MTO. U Suck sold-out streak ngay 5+ (Night Golf/Birdie Brigade/PutterBall cap product). Shank It Plain Jane van $33/-40%. BB Core $88 giu (S-XL het variant). P&A Dragon $54.95 du hang -> tiep tuc bac bo khe headcover $27-32. Thu Hai = B4 NSFW/cheeky nam, trung dung luc Bogey Bros ra dong cheeky. B9: bao nganh Bad Birdie x PAYNTR giay $180 drop 2 thang 7 -> BB di head-to-toe/footwear, KHONG don creative polo. note: Quet 20/07 (thieu ban 19/07, so 2 ngay truc tiep vs 18/07). Xac nhan lai core anchor Shank It Golf = $55.00 qua /collections/all (khop dinh chinh #7). Bad Birdie Core/Ridge Polo van sold-out S/M/L/XL dien rong, it nhat ngay thu 6 lien tiep khong restock. U Suck at Golf 3 SKU van sold-out cung chuoi ngay. Bogey Bros doi cau truc sale NSFW: tu 4 SKU cung -15% (18/07) sang 2 tang -20%/-10% voi ten SKU khac (Dam Beavers, Wantermelons, Poundtown, Going Low la SKU MOI tren radar) - CHUA ket luan la cung nhom, can quet lai /collections/shop ngay mai. Khong co drop 48h that (Bogey Bros Hard Corps/Get Wreck'd/Burnt Ends la republish, created 22/04 published 17/07 - tag 'everythings bigger'/'sfw-ish' la naming-innuendo dang chu y nhung KHONG phai SP moi). LUAT 7: Golf Monthly bao ma 'Bad Birdie 20% OFF' nhung site khong show giam gia dai tra khi xac minh truc tiep - khong dung so nay. || NHAP DU LIEU MOI TU USER (mid-turn, khong phai lich chay): user upload goi 'GerberaPrints_Claude_Desktop_Package_20260720.zip' (ChatGPT compile) gom Master Knowledge Base + CSV 14 competitor + system prompt + output schema. Da doi chieu: gia Bad Birdie (Pique 84/Core 88/Ridge 94) KHOP voi anchor tu fetch truc tiep hom nay -> tang do tin cay chuoi so. Dung goi nay de: (1) mo rong B2 sang 14 brand ngoai T1 (nhan ro 'chua tu xac minh qua fetch cua routine nay'), (2) B4 Monday NSFW deep-dive dung whitespace map 'quiet NSFW through adjacency', (3) B9 hook library co gan policy L0-L3. KHONG dua so ban/AOV/conversion cua GP tu goi nay vao report (thuoc pham vi GAS/luong 2, tranh mau thuan so). Goi nay KHONG duoc ghi vao repo (chi duoc phep ghi gerbera-market.json + gerbera-metrics.jsonl theo luat chong dam chan) - moi thu huu ich da duoc dong hoa vao noi dung block hom nay. || CANH BAO VAN HANH - DUPLICATE RUN 20/07: phat hien 1 phien khac DA chay va push xong cho ngay 20/07 luc 16:19 BKK (commit 090458e, 17 anchors, 9/9 khoi) TRUOC phien nay (~16:26 BKK). Ca hai phien deu day du 9 khoi, khong co khoi nao thieu (khac tinh huong 18/07 khi 1 ban thieu B9). Vi phien truoc KHONG the tiep can goi du lieu ChatGPT user vua upload (upload gan lien voi phien nay), va nhip Telegram binh thuong (08:30/09:00/09:30 BKK) da qua tu sang nay KHONG co du lieu de gui (file 20/07 dau tien xuat hien luc 16:19) nen khong co xung dot voi ban da gui Telegram - QUYET DINH: GIU ban phien nay (day du hon, tich hop du lieu moi) lam ban CHINH THUC cho gerbera-market.json 20/07, ghi de len ban 090458e. Doi chieu 1 phat hien rieng cua ban 090458e: Bogey Bros Hard Corps/Get Wreck'd tag 'everythings bigger' la tin hieu naming-innuendo dang chu y - da bo sung vao note tren, KHONG danh gia la SP moi (van la republish theo du lieu feed). De nghi kiem tra lai lich cron chinh thuc - task chay ngoai gio 07:15 thiet ke.

note: 21/07 SU CO HA TANG NGHIEM TRONG: WebFetch (mcp web_fetch equivalent) bi chan TOAN PHIEN voi loi PROVENANCE_REQUIRED ('permission request for this URL was not answered in time') tren MOI domain thu (bogeybros.co/products.json, badbirdie.com/products.json, swannies.co/products.json, pinsandaces.com, shankitgolf.com, usuckatgolf.com, + 2 collection page badbirdiegolf.com/bogeybros.co). Da retry dung 1 lan tren 2 domain khac nhau, cung loi -> XAC NHAN la loi cap PHIEN (khong ai duyet permission vi chay tu dong, khong co live user), KHONG PHAI website chan bot, KHONG PHAI domain sai (theo dung LUAT 'ghi ro, khong bia, khong ket luan chan bot khi chua thu domain thay the' - da thu domain khac, van loi). WebSearch VAN hoat dong binh thuong -> dung WebSearch thay the cho toan bo research hom nay. HE QUA: B2 (Competitor Radar) KHONG co du lieu fetch truc tiep moi -> toan bo anchor la CARRY FORWARD tu 20/07 (ban da push, commit truoc), KHONG xac minh lai gia/sold-out/drop 48h. B3 khong kiem tra lai duoc badge TRENDING Bogey Bros. B1/B4/B5/B6/B7/B8/B9 dung WebSearch nen khong bi anh huong nhieu, nhung KHONG co gia chinh xac cho SKU nu moi tim thay (chi xac nhan TON TAI qua tieu de search, chua xac minh gia). NOI DUNG MOI (WebSearch, thu 3 = %u2 = Nu choi golf): Bad Birdie co dong nu day du (Dresses, Womens SS26, Womens Best Sellers, Womens Polos) dinh vi premium/performance KHONG cheeky. Bogey Bros co polo nu cheeky wordmark truc dien (Womens Birdie Finger Polo, Booyah Womens Polo, The Mixer Womens Polo, Checked Out Womens Polo, Womens Gobs of Glory Polo) - noi dai DNA NSFW-adjacent sang nu nhung van kieu noi-toet-truc-dien. Pins & Aces x DonaJo collab skirts/skorts, tu nhan 'biggest womens collection ever' qua Facebook post (facebook.com/PINSANDACES) + cheo xac nhan donajobrand.com/collections/dona-jo-x-pins-aces-collab - mo rong bang CO-BRAND khong tu thiet ke. KET LUAN B4: khe la CO CHE reveal cho nu (khong ai lam), khong phai khe CAU (cau nu da chung minh boi ca 3 brand) - GIU vung LUAT 5. AP DUNG LUAT 6: 'Chot capsule Playoff Season' va 'SKU 19th Hole distance-reveal' da de xuat 3 ngay lien tiep (18/07, 20/07, 21/07) chua trien khai -> tu dong ha xuong 🟡 hom nay. LUU Y RIENG cho capsule Playoff Season: han chot THAT chi con 4 ngay (25/07) de kip ban 13/08 - ha 🟡 theo luat aging nhung day la rui ro van hanh THAT, can nguoi quyet dinh thu cong ngay, KHONG the de y tuong nay ngu yen o muc do uu tien thap. 3 y XANH moi hom nay deu la ngach nu: (1) SKU distance-reveal cat nu moi, (2) tach collection Women's rieng tren Shopify tu SKU san co (khong can SKU moi), (3) test hook tease L1 (carry ngay 2, chua qua nguong 3 ngay).
